name: small-fix
description: A small focused bug fix with descriptive commit message and issue reference

pr.title: Fix null user crash in login flow
pr.body:
Fixes #42.

When a user account is deleted but their session cookie persists, the login flow crashes with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'id')` because `findByEmail` returns null and we weren't checking for it.

This adds a null check before accessing user properties and returns a proper 401 response instead of crashing.

commits.message: fix: handle null user in login flow
commits.author: bob
